name: SDL2 Complete Structured Pack
description: Audited SDL2, SDL_image, SDL_ttf, SDL_mixer and SDL2_net pack with documented enum and bitmask pickers.

functions.name: SDL_CreateWindow

functions.name: SDL_WindowFlags
functions.signature:
typedef enum SDL_WindowFlags {
    SDL_WINDOW_FULLSCREEN,
    SDL_WINDOW_OPENGL,
    SDL_WINDOW_SHOWN,
    SDL_WINDOW_HIDDEN,
    SDL_WINDOW_BORDERLESS,
    SDL_WINDOW_RESIZABLE,
    SDL_WINDOW_MINIMIZED,
    SDL_WINDOW_MAXIMIZED,
    SDL_WINDOW_INPUT_GRABBED,
    SDL_WINDOW_ALLOW_HIGHDPI
} SDL_WindowFlags;
functions.description: Common window flags for SDL_CreateWindow and SDL_GetWindowFlags.
functions.longDescription: Curated subset of SDL window state and creation flags.
functions.declaration:
typedef enum SDL_WindowFlags {
    SDL_WINDOW_FULLSCREEN,
    SDL_WINDOW_OPENGL,
    SDL_WINDOW_SHOWN,
    SDL_WINDOW_HIDDEN,
    SDL_WINDOW_BORDERLESS,
    SDL_WINDOW_RESIZABLE,
    SDL_WINDOW_MINIMIZED,
    SDL_WINDOW_MAXIMIZED,
    SDL_WINDOW_INPUT_GRABBED,
    SDL_WINDOW_ALLOW_HIGHDPI
} SDL_WindowFlags;

functions.name: SDL_RendererFlags

functions.name: SDL_EventType
functions.signature:
typedef enum SDL_EventType {
    SDL_QUIT,
    SDL_WINDOWEVENT,
    SDL_KEYDOWN,
    SDL_KEYUP,
    SDL_MOUSEMOTION,
    SDL_MOUSEBUTTONDOWN,
    SDL_MOUSEBUTTONUP,
    SDL_MOUSEWHEEL,
    SDL_TEXTINPUT,
    SDL_USEREVENT
} SDL_EventType;
functions.description: Common event types delivered through SDL_Event.
functions.longDescription: Curated subset of the most common SDL event kinds for event loops and switch statements.
functions.declaration:
typedef enum SDL_EventType {
    SDL_QUIT,
    SDL_WINDOWEVENT,
    SDL_KEYDOWN,
    SDL_KEYUP,
    SDL_MOUSEMOTION,
    SDL_MOUSEBUTTONDOWN,
    SDL_MOUSEBUTTONUP,
    SDL_MOUSEWHEEL,
    SDL_TEXTINPUT,
    SDL_USEREVENT
} SDL_EventType;

functions.name: SDL3 migration reference
functions.signature: // SDL2 pack retained intentionally; consult the SDL3 migration guide before porting.
functions.description: Keep this pack explicit about its SDL2 target and point new migrations to the official SDL3 guide.
functions.longDescription: This library intentionally remains an SDL2 reference pack. SDL3 changes headers, return conventions and several APIs. Review the official SDL2-to-SDL3 migration guide before translating code.
